violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Chlorine sanitizer was changed and machine was primed to correct the violation on the spot.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils for ice noted stored on an absorbant surface and under the hand towel dispenser.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage and recycling container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling air return vents in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler door handle noted in need of repair.
